contents:
About Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School, Guntur Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School, also known as Dr. KLP Public School, was established in 1983. It is managed by the Nagarjuna Education Society and is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE).
School Information Year of Establishment 1983 School Area 12,485 Sq. Metres Parent Institution Nagarjuna Education Society Academics The Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) and offers a diverse range of streams including PCM, PCB, and Arts. The medium of instruction is English, catering to students from Nursery to 12th grade. It follows a co-educational system and operates as a boarding school with 87 classrooms. The school, categorized as unaided/independent, provides education up to Senior Secondary level and was established in 2005.
PRIMARY TO SECONDARY We follow the NCERT syllabus and curriculum from Grade I to XII, with a special focus on Artificial Intelligence for Classes IX & X.
SENIOR SECONDARY Stream Combination Additional Subject M.P.C Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, English Physical Education Bi.P.C Biology, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, English Physical Education M.Bi.P.C Mathematics, Biology, Physics, Chemistry, English Physical Education H.P.G History, Political Science, Geography, Computer Science, English Physical Education Total Fee for New Admissions The average fee for new admissions at Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School is ₹40,000/-.
Fee Breakdown Type Frequency Amount Tuition Fee Yearly ₹40,000 The fees provided above are to the best of our knowledge. This information might vary. Please contact the school for precise details.

School Information Year of Establishment 1983 School Area 12,485 Sq. Metres Parent Institution Nagarjuna Education Society Academics The Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School is affiliated with the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) and offers a diverse range of streams including PCM, PCB, and Arts.
title: Dr. Kondabolu Lakshmi Prasad Public School

contents:
About NARAYANA JR. COLLEGE BRUNDAVAN GARDEN GUNTUR Established in 2012 and managed by Pvt. Unaided, NARAYANA JR. COLLEGE BRUNDAVAN GARDEN GUNTUR is situated in an Urban area within the GUNTUR block of GUNTUR district, ANDHRA PRADESH. The college offers Grades 11 to 12 and operates as a Co-educational institution without a pre-primary section. Instruction is provided in English, and the academic session commences in April.
The college boasts N/A building infrastructure, comprising 0 classrooms in good condition. It also features 2 rooms for non-teaching activities and a separate room for the Headmaster/Teacher. However, there is no boundary wall or electric connection. Drinking water is sourced externally, and sanitation facilities include 0 functional boys’ toilets and 0 girls’ toilets. While there is no playground or library, the college does not require ramps for disabled access. Furthermore, computer facilities and mid-day meals are not provided.
